scripts.dev: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=python3; if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN=.venv/bin/python; fi; MEDIA_CORE_PORT=${MEDIA_CORE_PORT:-5011} PYTHONPATH=. $PYTHON_BIN run_dev.py'
scripts.start: sh -c 'PYTHON_BIN=python3; if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN=.venv/bin/python; fi; MEDIA_CORE_PORT=${MEDIA_CORE_PORT:-5011} PYTHONPATH=. $PYTHON_BIN run_dev.py'
